author: Haroen Viaene
subject: test(sffv): no longer test impossible responses (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#686)
body:
* test(sffv): no longer test impossible responses

Since the engine will always respond with `facetHits` on searchForFacetValues, we can assume this will always be defined.

follow-up to @samouss' comments on algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#674

* chore: turn into factory 🏭

* feedback
